memory:memory/2026-04-25.md:1:4.snippet: - Flangie CNC quote app: admin area moved to `/internal-admin`, with Supabase email/password login and allowlist via `ADMIN_EMAILS`. - Added lead/revenue/invoice tracking for `quotes` and a pre-lead monitoring pipeline (`pre_leads`, cron route, summary email, review dashboard). - User wants the pre-lead finder to store clean Reddit post permalinks, not search/media URLs.

memory:memory/2026-04-28.md:1:6.snippet: # 2026-04-28 - User is working on the Flangie CNC lead-generation system in a Next.js App Router + Supabase app. - User prefers very low-token progress updates: one short line with done/next/blocker/need-from-you style. - Prelead pipeline work has focused on SerpAPI discovery, stricter lead qualification, and later an AI classifier layer to reject irrelevant posts. - The user asked to continue implementing the AI classifier for prelead filtering.
